message:
test(oracle): add 20 conformance tests s81a-s81t probing JOIN + planner correctness

All 20 pass, 0 mismatches. Tests cover: three-table INNER JOIN, LEFT JOIN
NULL preservation, self-join hierarchy, JOIN+aggregate+HAVING, derived
tables, CROSS JOIN, JOIN with OR predicates, JOIN+window functions,
CTE+JOIN, JOIN+DISTINCT, correlated subquery in SELECT with JOIN,
multi-column JOIN key, JOIN+CASE, LEFT JOIN+COALESCE, four-table chain,
JOIN+UNION, subquery in WHERE with JOIN, JOIN+ORDER BY multi-column,
JOIN+LIMIT/OFFSET, JOIN+GROUP_CONCAT.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
